findings.location: s1 — 確認画面の出力（codeId:0001）および（codeId:0002）の説明
findings.description: knowledge file adds the phrase「HTMLのinput要素ではなくラベルのテキストのみが出力される」to describe confirmation screen output. The source file does not contain this statement; it simply shows the plain text output values (e.g., `許可`, `不許可`) without any such explanation.
findings.source_evidence: Source shows confirmation screen output as: `許可` / `不許可` and `Y:YES(イエス)` / `N:NO(ノー)` with JSP comments only — no statement about input elements being absent or labels only being rendered.
